The Club

Private tennis,
carefully hosted.

01

Private and curated

Intimate tennis gatherings for a carefully selected circle, held at the right pace — social, considered, and calm.

02

Everything arranged

Courts, coaching, equipment and refreshments handled in advance. Nothing left to chance.

03

Effortless by design

Each session is guided by a licensed coach who navigates the entire experience. Players are grouped by level—ensuring everyone plays at the right intensity and gets the most out of the session. This is not just a social—it’s structured, elevated group training.

Next Event

Tennis Social

A coach-led group session.

A coach-led group session designed to combine structure and social energy — with everything taken care of. All equipment is provided — rackets, balls, and everything on court. Players are grouped by level.

Membership

Membership First. Access Second.

How it works.

London Wellness Club is curated. You apply, we review, and approved members gain access to private events. No membership fee — you only pay for sessions you attend.

Numbers are kept intentionally small. Access is earned, not assumed. Every session is designed around the people in the room.

01
Apply Fill in the form. Takes under a minute. No commitment required.
02
Get reviewed Every application is reviewed personally. We respond within 24–48 hours.
03
Gain access Approved members can purchase access to events. Pay per session — no recurring fees.

Frequently Asked

Membership is by application only. Fill in the form on this page and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.

Yes. We keep numbers limited intentionally. Apply now to secure your place.

We are based in London. The exact location is shared after your application is confirmed.

Membership is free. Once accepted, you gain access to events—each priced individually and shared upon confirmation.

All levels welcome — character and attitude matter more than ability.

Members may bring guests on a limited basis. Full details shared upon joining.

We typically respond within 24–48 hours of receiving your application.

Smart casual in club areas, appropriate sports attire on court.
